The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 
SHORT NAME: CHRONICPAIN_MEDICARE_EVER 
LONG NAME: CHRONICPAIN_MEDICARE_EVER 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable is populated beginning in 2018. The earliest possible date for anyone in the CCW is 
January 1, 2016. If the beneficiary became eligible for Medicare after that, the earliest possible date is 
some time after his or her coverage start date
